variant_name: 沈词 — 前世新婚时期的年轻夫君
trigger: 前世新婚第二日，沈家厅堂中陆姝仪给高令宁敬茶、婚姻裂痕初现时出现。

appearance_delta.face: 比主线时期更年轻，清俊感更明显，神情仍冷，但少了后期的疲惫与病态，更多是年轻权贵的锋利与自负
appearance_delta.body: 身量挺拔清瘦，处于年轻新婚阶段，姿态更硬，尚未被婚姻消磨出狼狈感
appearance_delta.hair: 发式严整，可能配合新婚礼制使用更正式的冠饰，整体比平日更庄重
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 置身喜堂红意之间仍显得格外冷，和喜庆环境形成鲜明反差，像一块不化的寒玉

costume_override.outfit: 前世新婚次日的礼制袍服或偏正式婚后常礼服，保留世家新婚的庄重感，但颜色压得较深

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese newlywed noble husband in a traditional wedding hall, handsome refined young man with pale skin, cold restrained expression, tall slender build, black hair tied under a formal crown, dark red and black ceremonial hanfu with subtle gold trim, standing in a festive interior with red silk decorations and tea set, elegant but emotionally distant, cinematic Chinese period drama, high detail
visual_prompt_negative: modern wedding suit, smiling groom, western wedding, beard, messy hairstyle, bright cheerful mood, fantasy costume, armor
emotional_tone: 喜色表层下的冷漠与疏离，婚姻裂痕的起点
